debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn : n > 0
⊢ deriv riemannZeta (-2 * ↑n) ≠ 0

failed_attempts:
apply zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple
  · intro h
    rw [CriticalStrip] at h
    simp at h
    norm_cast at h
    linarith [h.1]
  · have : -2 * (n : ℂ) = -2 * ((n - 1 : ℕ) + 1) := by
      congr; norm_cast; exact (Nat.sub_add_cancel hn).symm
    rw [this]
    exact riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one_eq_zero (n - 1)

apply zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple
  · simp [CriticalStrip]
    norm_cast
    linarith
  · exact riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat_eq_zero (ne_of_gt hn)

cases n with
  | zero => contradiction
  | succ k =>
    rw [Nat.cast_succ]
    exact RiemannZeta.deriv_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one_ne_zero k

have h_zero : riemannZeta (-2 * ↑n) = 0 := by
    rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel hn, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
    exact riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one (n - 1)
  apply zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple _ _ h_zero
  simp [CriticalStrip]
  intro h
  linarith

apply zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple
  · intro h
    rw [CriticalStrip, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
    have : (-2 * (n : ℂ)).re = -2 * n := by simp
    rw [this] at h
    have : -2 * (n : ℝ) < 0 := mul_neg_of_neg_of_pos (by norm_num) (Nat.cast_pos.mpr hn)
    exact not_lt_of_gt this h.1
  · exact riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat_eq_zero (ne_of_gt hn)

apply zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple
  · intro h
    rw [CriticalStrip, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
    have h_re : (-2 * (n : ℂ)).re = -2 * n := by simp
    rw [h_re] at h
    have h_neg : -2 * (n : ℝ) < 0 := mul_neg_of_neg_of_pos (neg_lt_zero.mpr zero_lt_two) (Nat.cast_pos.mpr hn)
    exact not_lt_of_gt h_neg h.1
  · obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero (Nat.ne_of_gt hn)
    rw [Nat.cast_succ]
    exact riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one m

have ⟨m, hm⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero (Nat.ne_of_gt hn)
  rw [hm, Nat.cast_succ]
  exact riemannZeta_deriv_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one_ne_zero m

apply zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple
  · intro h
    rw [CriticalStrip, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
    have : (-2 * (n : ℂ)).re = -2 * n := by simp
    linarith [h.1, Nat.cast_pos.mpr hn]
  · obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero (Nat.ne_of_gt hn)
    simpa using riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one_eq_zero k

let s := -2 * (n : ℂ)
  have h_zero : riemannZeta s = 0 := by
    obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero (Nat.ne_of_gt hn)
    simp only [Nat.cast_succ, s]
    exact riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one k
  apply zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple s _ h_zero
  intro h
  rw [CriticalStrip, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
  have hre : s.re = -2 * n := by simp [s]
  rw [hre] at h
  have neg : -2 * (n : ℝ) < 0 := mul_neg_of_neg_of_pos (by norm_num) (Nat.cast_pos.mpr hn)
  exact lt_irrefl 0 (lt_trans h.1 neg)

    linarith
  · rw [← Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos hn, Nat.cast_succ]
